bullets: Managed IT operations, AWS infrastructure, and technical administration for a cloud-based SaaS platform serving veterinary clinics nationwide.
Led and mentored the engineering team, providing guidance on technical issues, prioritizing workload, and strengthening database, integration, and deployment capabilities.
Reduced AWS costs by over $6,000/month through infrastructure analysis and optimization across cloud services.
Migrated the entire development and production stack to Docker, improving system reliability, scalability, and deployment consistency.
Coordinated vendor relationships and managed technology contracts through platform end-of-life after acquisition by Shepherd Veterinary Software.
Built and maintained 11+ internal applications end-to-end, including front-end interfaces, back-end APIs, database design, and CI/CD pipelines.
Developed system integrations between enterprise platforms, including cron-based data synchronization from network-restricted Oracle databases with complex multi-table joins.
Replaced legacy institutional systems with modern web applications, automating manual administrative workflows across multiple departments.
Ran requirement-gathering meetings across HR, academic departments, and faculty to align technology solutions with operational needs.
Collaborated cross-functionally with designers and developers, translating business requirements into reliable, maintainable systems.

projects.name: Hippo Manager 2.0
projects.tech: Vue.js, Laravel, GraphQL, MySQL, Amazon Web Services (AWS), Docker, Tailwind CSS
projects.description: Cloud-based enterprise platform covering billing, scheduling, client management, reporting, and treatments, supported by MySQL databases and AWS infrastructure.

projects.name: Course Schedule
projects.tech: Vue.js, .NET, PostgreSQL, Oracle Database, Firebase, Docker, Tailwind CSS
projects.description: Enterprise data integration application syncing course data hourly from a legacy Oracle schema involving seven-table joins, with PostgreSQL for application data and dynamic filtering UI.
